title: Oil Falls on Hopes for US-Iran Negotiations, Hormuz Progress
title_cn: 美伊谈判的希望和霍尔木兹海峡的进展导致油价下跌

summary: Bloomberg's Laura Nahmias joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Citadel’s Ken Griffin reportedly met this week with New York Governor Kathy Hochul after a spat with Mayor Zohran Mamdani that centered on Griffin's $238 million Manhattan penthouse.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mount Sinai Announces Rowan Women's Heath Center
title_cn: 西奈山宣布设立罗文妇女健康中心
summary: Dr. Fanny Elahi, Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai Associate Professor of Neurology and Neuroscience joins to discuss Mount Sinai's new Rowan Women’s Health Center. Dr. Elahi also discussed neurodegenerative disease, aging, midlife intervention in women on Bloomberg Businessweek Daily. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Versant’s SportsEngine to Sell to Genstar’s PlayMetrics

title: Stocks Hit Record as Oil Falls on US-Iran Hopes: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于美国和伊朗的希望导致油价下跌，股市创下历史新高：市场结束
summary: A record-breaking run drove stocks toward their longest weekly rally since 2024 amid hopes for a deal to end the Iran war that has rattled financial markets and jeopardized the economic outlook.

title: Trump Says US to Hike Tariff Rate on EU Auto Imports
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将提高欧盟汽车进口关税
summary: President Donald Trump says he will increase tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union to 25%, claiming the bloc is not complying with a trade agreement. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Semiannual Reporting Proposal Clears White House Review
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会半年度报告提案通过白宫审查
summary: A Securities and Exchange Commission plan to let public companies cut quarterly disclosures to twice a year moved closer to reality after passing a White House review.

title: Iran Believes They Outlast the US Says Mona Yacoubian
title_cn: 莫娜·雅库比安表示，伊朗相信他们比美国更长寿
summary:
Mona Yacoubian, Director of the Middle East Program at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, discusses the ongoing diplomatic deadlock regarding the closure of the Strait of Hormuz. Despite the president's statement that there is no current reason to engage in direct talks due to a lack of breakthrough, the situation remains tense with the strait fully shut down. Yacoubian highlights that the president has received military options from CENTCOM, including the possibility of limited but forceful strikes aimed at breaking the stalemate and compelling Iran to negotiate. However, it remains uncertain whether such military action would succeed in advancing diplomatic efforts. The segment underscores the precarious balance between peace and conflict as the standoff continues into the weekend.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Natural Gas Futures Rally to Three-Week High on Output Cuts
title_cn: 减产推动美国天然气期货上涨至三周高位
summary: US natural gas futures ended at the highest in three weeks, reversing earlier losses, as producers rein in output in response to mild weather and above-average inventory levels.

title: Brown University Slashed Stake in Blue Owl Private Credit Fund
title_cn: 布朗大学削减了蓝猫头鹰私人信贷基金的股份
summary: Brown University’s $8 billion endowment cut its position in a Blue Owl Capital Inc. private credit fund by more than half last quarter, joining retail investors in scaling back exposure to the $1.8 trillion market.

title: Boat Demand Defies High Gas Prices
title_cn: 船舶需求挑战高油价
summary:
The boat giant Brunswick beat earnings, the CEO Dave Foulkes says high gas prices aren't slowing demand, yet. He says fuel cost worries are overblown while premium boat buyers keep spending strong. He joined Bloomberg Open Interest to discuss booming Florida sales and global logistics challenges.

(Corrects headline and description to align with guest) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Growth Engine Powers Ahead | Open Interest 5/1/2026
title_cn: 苹果增长引擎强劲前进 |未平仓合约 2026 年 5 月 1 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Apple caps a blockbuster earnings week with a strong outlook, while Jane Street’s pay pool surges past Wall Street giants. Tensions rise as Iran floats a new proposal and President Trump doubles down on a naval blockade. OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar flags explosive demand. Billionaire Jorge Perez explains Miami’s boom. Brunswick’s CEO give us details on resilient boat demand. And Como 1907’s Mirwan Suwarso joins Bloomberg Open Interest on how he's building a luxury sports empire. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Venezuela Oil Exports Hit 1 Million Barrels a Day  in Post-Maduro Era
title_cn: 后马杜罗时代委内瑞拉石油出口量达到每天 100 万桶
summary: Venezuela’s crude exports rose for a third month, surpassing 1 million barrels a day in April and highlighting a swift rebound less than six months after the ouster of strongman Nicolas Maduro.

title: Bond Traders Hedge for Both Cuts and Hikes After Fed Division
title_cn: 债券交易员对美联储分部后的降息和加息进行对冲
summary: A rare opportunity is opening up in rates derivatives underlying the $31 trillion Treasury market: Division at the Federal Reserve has traders placing bets on interest-rate cuts next year while also hedging for a hike.

title: Congo Ex-President Kabila Denounces US Sanctions Against Him
title_cn: 刚果前总统卡比拉谴责美国对他的制裁
summary: Former president of the Democratic Republic of Congo, Joseph Kabila, denounced US sanctions against him for his alleged ties to a rebel group occupying a large part of the country’s mineral-rich east.

title: Shopify Analyst Who Saw Selloff Coming Says Too Soon to Buy
title_cn: 看到抛售即将到来的 Shopify 分析师表示，现在买入还为时过早
summary: The analyst who slapped the only sell rating on Shopify Inc. over valuation concerns ahead of its blistering rout said it’s still too soon to jump back in.

title: Lake Como Club’s Bold Business Play
title_cn: 科莫湖俱乐部的大胆商业策略
summary: A small Italian soccer club is rewriting the business of sports—turning Lake Como into a luxury global brand. Como 1907 President Mirwan Suwarso joined Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about how he's building a multi-club retail empire, targeting US fans, and scaling through partnerships. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Exxon, Chevron Beat Profit Estimates on War-Driven Oil Rally
title_cn: 埃克森美孚和雪佛龙在战争驱动的石油上涨中超出了利润预期
summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. and Chevron Corp. posted stronger-than-expected earnings for the first quarter as higher oil and natural gas prices outweighed production outages from the Iran war.

title: Exxon CEO Feels ‘Positive’ on Venezuela After Earlier Criticism
title_cn: 埃克森美孚首席执行官在早些时候的批评后对委内瑞拉感到“积极”
summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. is looking seriously at reinvesting in Venezuela just months after Chief Executive Officer Darren Woods told President Donald Trump the South American nation’s oil sector was “uninvestable.”

title: Trump Says Iran Wants a Deal, But He’s ‘Not Satisfied’
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗希望达成协议，但他“不满意”
summary: President Donald Trump discusses Iran’s latest proposal to end the war and says negotiators have “made strides, but I’m not sure if they ever get there.” Trump spoke with reporters Friday at the White House.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: War Rebound Sends Muni Bonds to Best April Since 2014
title_cn: 战争反弹使市政债券创下 2014 年以来最佳 4 月表现
summary: The municipal-bond market roared back in April to deliver its best performance for that month in over a decade, as investors found their footing following a stretch of war-fueled volatility.

title: Yen Traders Alert After Japan’s $34.5 Billion Intervention
title_cn: 日本 345 亿美元干预后日元交易者发出警报
summary: Yen traders are on watch for signs of further action by Japanese authorities after intervention triggered the currency’s sharpest rally in three years on Thursday.

title: BP Reviews UK North Sea Assets as New CEO Eyes Disposals
title_cn: 英国石油公司审查英国北海资产，新任首席执行官着眼于出售
summary: BP Plc is considering potentially exiting part or all of its operations in the UK North Sea, people familiar with the matter said, as the oil giant works to strip assets and pay down debt.

title: Apple Forecasts Sales Growth Amid Memory Shortage | Bloomberg Tech 5/1/2026
title_cn: 苹果预测内存短缺导致销量增长彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 1 日
summary:
Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Apple’s strong outlook amid the continued memory supply crunch. Plus, Roblox CEO Dave Baszucki discusses the gaming platform’s "aggressive push to enhance safety" that tempered user growth. And, Bloomberg spoke with OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar who pushes back on a report that the AI leader is missing its own targets.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Some Investor 'Choosiness' for AI Debt: Cisar
title_cn: Cisar：一些投资者对人工智能债务“挑剔”
summary: Winnie Cisar, global head of strategy at CreditSights, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." After a $300 billion AI debt binge that spanned every corner of the credit market, investors are starting to show some signs of fatigue. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BMO Turns to AI and Quantum Computing to Predict Earthquakes
title_cn: BMO 利用人工智能和量子计算来预测地震
summary: Bank of Montreal is betting on artificial intelligence and quantum computing to help predict earthquakes and respond to wildfires as part of the Canadian bank’s expansion in the US.

title: Roblox Shares Dive on Slower User Growth
title_cn: Roblox 股价因用户增长放缓而暴跌
summary: Roblox stock plummeted after the company slashed its full-year bookings forecast, admitting that new age-verification and child-safety features are creating major short-term friction for user growth. Roblox CEO Dave Baszucki joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Twilio CEO on Its ‘Milestone Quarter’
title_cn: Twilio 首席执行官谈其“里程碑季度”
summary: Twilio reported its fastest revenue growth in over three years, fueled by a massive surge in AI-driven demand. Twilio CEO Khozema Shipchandler discussed what he called a “milestone quarter” with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI CFO Sees ‘Vertical Wall of Demand’ for Products
title_cn: OpenAI 首席财务官看到了产品的“垂直需求墙”
summary: OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar says the company is meeting objectives and sees a “vertical wall of demand” for its products. Bloomberg's Shirin Ghaffary joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow to discuss those comments on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russian Hacker Pleads Guilty in Oil and Gas Facility Attacks
title_cn: 俄罗斯黑客承认袭击石油和天然气设施
summary: A Russian hacker who broke into and damaged critical oil and gas infrastructure in the US, Ukraine and other countries pleaded guilty to charges that carry as many as 27 years in prison.

title: BMO's Milchanowski on Quantum's Banking Sector Impact
title_cn: BMO 的 Milchanowski 谈量子对银行业的影响
summary: BMO Chief AI and Quantum Officer Kristin Milchanowski discusses how cutting edge AI and quantum tech will impact business, and the banking sector, for the foreseeable future. She talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nuclear AI Startup Fermi Promised Land and Ample Power. But It Couldn't Sign a Single Client
title_cn: 核人工智能初创公司费米承诺土地和充足的电力。但它无法签署单个客户
summary: Now the ex-CEO is waging a battle for Fermi’s future and its vision of atomic-powered data centers in the Texas panhandle.

title: Meta Acquires Robotics AI Company to Help Build Humanoid Technology
title_cn: Meta 收购 Robotics AI 公司，帮助构建人形技术
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. has acquired Assured Robot Intelligence, a startup developing artificial intelligence models for robots, as part of a major initiative to build humanoid technology.

title: US Stocks Extend Record Gains, Oil Falls on Iran Talks Report
title_cn: 美国股市延续创纪录涨幅，伊朗谈判报告导致油价下跌
summary: The S&P 500 Index extended record-breaking gains Friday as tech mega-caps delivered a stream of solid earnings. Reports that Iran had responded to US amendments on an agreement to end the war also buoyed sentiment, sending oil prices lower.

title: Roblox to Challenge Unity, Unreal Engines With New AI Software
title_cn: Roblox 将利用新的 AI 软件挑战 Unity 和虚幻引擎
summary: Roblox Corp. is launching a new product that will position its popular video-game creation software to better compete with Unity Software Inc. and Epic Games, whose engines are used by most big-budget game-makers.

title: US Economy 'Incredibly Resilient': Mossavar-Rahmani
title_cn: 莫萨瓦尔-拉赫马尼：美国经济“极其有弹性”
summary: Sharmin Mossavar-Rahmani, wealth management CIO and head of the investment strategy group at Goldman Sachs, says the US economy has been "incredibly resilient" despite the impact of the Iran war. She joined "Bloomberg Surveillance" on April 30 to discuss how significant AI spending by Big Tech and restrictive monetary policies are shaping market dynamics. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI CFO Sees ‘Vertical Wall of Demand’ for Products
title_cn: OpenAI 首席财务官看到了产品的“垂直需求墙”
summary: OpenAI Chief Financial Officer Sarah Friar pushed back on concerns about missing internal targets, saying the company is meeting objectives and sees “a vertical wall of demand” for its products.

title: Microsoft, Amazon Hand Pentagon More Control Over AI Systems Use
title_cn: 微软、亚马逊让五角大楼对人工智能系统的使用有更多控制权
summary: The Pentagon has struck agreements with more technology companies for expanded use of advanced artificial intelligence tools on classified military networks, according to a Defense Department statement and two defense officials briefed on the matter.

title: Tether’s Gold Hoard Nears $20 Billion as Buying Continues
title_cn: 随着购买的继续，Tether 的黄金储备接近 200 亿美元
summary: Tether Holdings SA bought more than six tons of gold for its reserves in the first three months of the year, extending a buying streak that’s made it the largest known holder of bullion in the world outside of banks and nation states.

title: What’s Tech’s Next iPhone Moment?
title_cn: iPhone 的下一个科技时刻是什么？
summary:
Will OpenAI ever bring a smartphone, or some other smartphone-like device, to market?

On this episode of the Everybody's Business podcast, we are joined by Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman, the author of the Power On newsletter and managing editor for consumer technology. He tells Stacey Vanek Smith and Max Chafkin whether such a device could succeed and what the next iPhone moment might look like. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank-Tied Deal Raises Nearly $1 Billion for US Data Centers
title_cn: 软银联合交易为美国数据中心筹集近 10 亿美元资金
summary: A data-center developer sold $999 million of junk bonds for a project leased to a SoftBank Group Corp. subsidiary, capping April’s surge of debt issuance to help fund artificial intelligence efforts amid some concerns that such spending won’t pay off.

title: Apple Forecast Tops Estimates Even as Mac Shortages Linger
title_cn: 尽管 Mac 短缺问题依然存在，但苹果的预测仍高于预期
summary: Apple Inc. delivered a surprisingly strong revenue forecast for the third quarter, even as it warned that memory-chip costs will increase and that shortages of Mac computers will persist for “several months.”

title: Roblox Shares Fall Most in Four Years on Slowing User Growth
title_cn: 由于用户增长放缓，Roblox 股价出现四年来最大跌幅
summary: Roblox Corp. shares plunged the most in more than four years on Friday after the video game company reported fewer daily users in the first quarter than analysts expected, due to safety features it implemented to restrict how kids can use the platform.

title: OpenAI CFO Cites ‘Vertical Wall of Demand’ for Products
title_cn: OpenAI 首席财务官引用产品的“垂直需求墙”
summary: OpenAI Chief Financial Officer Sarah Friar sees “a vertical wall of demand” for the company’s products as she pushed back Thursday on concerns about missing internal targets in a Bloomberg interview. Ed Ludlow reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Caterpillar’s Biggest Bear Folds as AI Power Demand Soars
title_cn: 随着人工智能电力需求飙升，卡特彼勒最大的熊市倒闭
summary: Caterpillar Inc.’s biggest Wall Street bear has thrown in the towel after watching the stock more than double on the back of surging demand for the company’s power generation equipment.

title: Wall Street Is Bullish on Oracle, But Investors Aren’t Buying It
title_cn: 华尔街看好甲骨文，但投资者并不买账
summary: To Wall Street, Oracle Corp. is a screaming buy. To many investors, however, the company’s relationship with OpenAI, its sizable debt load and the durability of its software business have made owning the stock a risk.

title: Thiel’s Founders Fund Raises $6 Billion in Its Largest-Ever Haul
title_cn: Thiel 创始人基金筹集了 60 亿美元，这是有史以来规模最大的一次
summary: Peter Thiel’s Founders Fund has raised $6 billion for a new fund to invest in later-stage companies, according to people familiar with the matter, marking the firm’s largest haul ever.

title: Artemis II Is Just the Opening Act for NASA, Isaacman Says
title_cn: 艾萨克曼表示，阿尔忒弥斯二号只是美国宇航局的开幕表演
summary: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman discusses the future of US space travel and the Trump administration’s plans for the moon, Mars, and beyond. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dan Ives Sees Apple ‘Golden Age’ as It Monetizes Consumer AI
title_cn: 丹·艾夫斯 (Dan Ives) 认为苹果公司通过消费者人工智能货币化的“黄金时代”
summary: “The consumer AI revolution is gonna go through Cupertino,” says Dan Ives, global head of tech research and senior equity analyst at Wedbush Securities, as he discusses expectations for Apple’s AI strategy after the company delivered a surprisingly strong revenue forecast for the third quarter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank-Backed Opay Hires Citi, Deutsche, JPMorgan for US IPO
title_cn: 软银支持的 Opay 聘请花旗、德意志银行、摩根大通参与美国 IPO
summary: Opay Digital Services Ltd. is working with Citigroup Inc., Deutsche Bank AG, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. as the Nigeria-focused payments platform prepares for an initial public offering, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Nebius Agrees to Buy Startup That Makes AI Run Faster, Cheaper
title_cn: Nebius 同意收购让人工智能运行更快、更便宜的初创公司
summary: The cloud provider’s deal for Eigen AI will help the inference business

title: Trump Bemoans State of Iran Talks, Says Prefers Not to Strike
title_cn: 特朗普哀叹伊朗国情谈判，表示宁愿不发动袭击
summary: President Donald Trump expressed displeasure with the current state of negotiations with Iran but stopped short of threatening fresh military action in the nine-week conflict that’s triggered a global energy crisis.

title: Trump Plans 25% Tariff on European Autos
title_cn: 特朗普计划对欧洲汽车征收 25% 关税
summary: President Donald Trump says he will increase tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union to 25%, claiming the bloc is not complying with a trade agreement. Tyler Kendall reports on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Vows 25% Tariff on European Autos in Escalating Trade Rift
title_cn: 贸易裂痕升级 特朗普誓言对欧洲汽车征收25%关税
summary: President Donald Trump said he was raising tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union to 25%, claiming that the bloc had failed to fully comply with a trade agreement negotiated with the US.

title: US Sanctions Iran Exchanges, China Terminal on Oil Purchases
title_cn: 美国制裁伊朗交易所和中国码头购买石油
summary: The Trump administration sanctioned three Iranian currency exchanges and a Chinese oil terminal on Friday, as the US adds to pressure on Tehran to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: US Warns Shippers of Possible Sanctions If They Pay Hormuz Tolls
title_cn: 美国警告托运人如果支付霍尔木兹通行费可能会受到制裁
summary: The US government issued a warning about the sanctions risk of paying tolls to Iran for safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz, which has been shut since the war against Tehran began.

title: Sheinbaum to Announce Steps to Boost Mexico’s Private Investment
title_cn: 希因鲍姆将宣布采取措施促进墨西哥私人投资
summary: President Claudia Sheinbaum said she will announce on Monday a series of measures aimed at strengthening private investment in Mexico, centered on a “radical simplification” of bureaucratic procedures.

title: Trump Ramps Up Pressure on Cuba With Fresh Sanctions Push
title_cn: 特朗普通过新的制裁加大对古巴的压力
summary: President Donald Trump imposed new sanctions on top Cuban officials, the White House said, part of a months-long push by the administration to ramp up economic and security pressure on the island.

title: Trump Administration to Appeal Ruling on NYC Congestion Toll
title_cn: 特朗普政府将对纽约市拥堵收费裁决提出上诉
summary: President Donald Trump’s administration is continuing its push to end New York City’s congestion pricing program by appealing a decision by a federal judge that allowed the tolling plan to proceed.

title: Brazil’s Bolsonaro Undergoes Successful Shoulder Surgery
title_cn: 巴西博尔索纳罗成功接受肩部手术
summary: Former President Jair Bolsonaro underwent a successful surgical procedure on his right shoulder Friday at a hospital in Brasilia and is currently recuperating in an inpatient unit for pain management and clinical observation, according to the hospital statement.

title: EU Parliament Trade Chief Calls Trump Tariff Threat Unacceptable
title_cn: 欧盟议会贸易负责人称特朗普关税威胁不可接受
summary: The head of the European Parliament’s trade committee called President Donald Trump’s threat to boost tariffs on EU cars and trucks “unacceptable,” and criticized the US for being an unreliable partner.

title: Trump Says Still Looking at Spirit, Final Proposal Delivered
title_cn: 特朗普表示仍在考虑精神，最终提案已交付
summary: President Donald Trump said the federal government was still looking at a rescue plan for Spirit Airlines and had delivered a “final proposal.”

title: Trump Says He Will ‘Probably’ Go to G-7 Summit in France
title_cn: 特朗普称他“可能”前往法国参加七国集团峰会
summary: US President Donald Trump indicated he plans to attend the Group of Seven leaders’ summit in France in June, even with the US at odds with key allies over the Iran war and trade.

title: Trump Says US Still Looking at Spirit, Will Give Final Proposal
title_cn: 特朗普称美国仍在考虑精神号，将给出最终建议
summary: President Donald Trump says the federal government was still looking at a rescue plan for Spirit Airlines and would offer a final proposal soon during remarks with reporters at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Surprise Colombian Rate Decision Helps Avoid Volatility, Central Banker Says
title_cn: 央行行长表示，哥伦比亚出人意料的利率决定有助于避免波动
summary: Colombia’s surprise decision to halt interest rate increases this week was intended to prevent upheaval, but may come at a cost, according to central bank co-director Mauricio Villamizar.

title: Anger and Fear Overwhelms London’s Golders Green After Antisemitic Attack
title_cn: 反犹太主义袭击后，愤怒和恐惧淹没了伦敦的戈尔德斯绿地
summary: Abraham was studying in a synagogue in Golders Green, north London, on Wednesday morning when someone rushed in with a warning: lock the doors, an attacker is on the rampage. Just outside, two Jewish men had been stabbed. Police surrounded the assailant, and arrested him on suspicion of attempted murder. For the 40–year-old Israeli, a visit to friends became a reminder of how quickly a sense of normality can shatter, even far from home.

title: US Sanctions Congo Ex-President Joseph Kabila for Rebel Ties
title_cn: 美国因与叛军关系而制裁刚果前总统约瑟夫·卡比拉
summary: The US sanctioned Joseph Kabila, the former president of the Democratic Republic of Congo, for his ties to a rebel group occupying a large part of the country’s mineral-rich east.

title: Lula Unveils Debt Relief Program Ahead of Elections
title_cn: 卢拉在选举前推出债务减免计划
summary: President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva on Thursday announced a program to renegotiate household debt, his latest measure to support consumption as he seeks to bolster his popularity ahead of Brazil’s October election.

title: Economic Crosscurrents Mount as Energy Shock Meets AI Wave
title_cn: 能源冲击与人工智能浪潮相遇，经济逆流加剧
summary: The global economy is increasingly captive to two opposing forces.

title: Trump’s US Tariffs Turn UK Trade Surpluses Into Deficits
title_cn: 特朗普的美国关税将英国贸易顺差变成赤字
summary: President Donald Trump’s tariffs have resulted in a sharp fall in UK exports to the US, turning British trade surpluses into deficits in a dramatic reversal of transatlantic trade dynamics, according to official data.

title: GOP Steers Clear on Iran as War Hits Key 60-Day Milestone
title_cn: 随着战争达到 60 天的关键里程碑，共和党不再关注伊朗问题
summary: Trump is looking to buy more time to reach a deal, and most Republicans are glad to give it.

title: American Farmers Shun USDA Surveys as Trust in Data Erodes
title_cn: 美国农民回避美国农业部调查，因为对数据的信任受到侵蚀
summary: American farmers are ignoring US Department of Agriculture surveys in the latest sign of distrust in government data.

title: New York’s Ultra-Rich Defend Citadel’s Griffin As Penthouse Dig Turns Personal
title_cn: 纽约超级富豪捍卫 Citadel 的格里芬，顶层公寓挖掘变成私人
summary: The press release from Zohran Mamdani declaring New York City’s first pied-à-terre tax cited a $238 million penthouse in Midtown bought by one Ken Griffith.

title: The US States Where Gas Prices Are Surging Fastest Under Trump
title_cn: 特朗普治下美国天然气价格上涨最快的州
summary:
US President Donald Trump has vowed to maintain a naval blockade on Iran, reiterating that the policy is depriving the Islamic Republic of much-needed oil revenue. West Texas Intermediate, the main US crude marker, rallied toward $111 a barrel on Thursday, while Brent, the global benchmark, topped $126.

Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei cast doubt on the prospects of a deal, vowing not to give up the Islamic Republic’s nuclear or missile technologies, and signaling Tehran would keep control of the Strait of Hormuz.

The American Automobile Association says in California, the average statewide price for regular gasoline rose to $6.01, the highest since October 2023. Skyrocketing pump prices are a major political risk for President Donald Trump’s White House, especially ahead of the midterm elections.

Bloomberg's Charlie Wells explains on "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Corruption Scandals Are Plaguing Argentina’s Milei
title_cn: 腐败丑闻困扰着阿根廷米莱
summary: The libertarian president is stretching the boundaries of what voters will take.

title: How the Strait of Hormuz Has Become a Weapon of War
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡如何成为战争武器
summary: No region of the world produces more oil and gas than the countries straddling the Persian Gulf, and most of it needs to travel by tanker via the Strait of Hormuz.

title: How Taiwan Became the World's Most Perilous Geopolitical Chokepoint
title_cn: 台湾如何成为世界上最危险的地缘政治咽喉要地
summary: Eyck Freymann on the biggest flashpoint of them all.

title: Odd Lots: How Taiwan Could Become a Global Chokepoint (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：台湾如何成为全球的咽喉要道（播客）
summary: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has highlighted the potential for long-running theoretical chokepoints to turn into reality, with dramatic results for both geopolitics and the global economy. But the hypothetical scenario that policymakers have arguably been losing the most sleep over for decades is the prospect of a major conflict between China and Taiwan. So how likely is it, and what would such a conflict actually look like? On this episode, we speak with Eyck Freymann, author of the new

title: Oil Holds Weekly Gain as Trump Sticks With Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普坚持封锁，油价保持每周上涨
summary: Oil held its second weekly gain as US President Donald Trump said he was sticking with a naval blockade of Iranian ports. Oil has soared more than a quarter over the past two weeks as the deadlock in negotiations extends the near-total closure of the crucial waterway, which before the war carried about a fifth of the world’s crude. Bloomberg’s Anthony di Paola reports.

title: Trump Sticks With Blockade, Says It’s ‘Incredible’
title_cn: 特朗普坚持封锁，称这“令人难以置信”
summary: US President Donald Trump said he was sticking with a naval blockade of Iranian ports as concerns the vital Strait of Hormuz would not reopen anytime soon continue. “The blockade is incredible,” Trump told reporters at the White House. Bloomberg’s Stuart Livingstone-Wallace reports.
